name: PANZI
full_name: Polyhedral Acoustic Network & Zero-delay Intensity Engine
author: Gary Doman (GareBear99 / TizWildin)
dsp_highlights: 4 polyhedral topologies: Diamond, Cube, Cylinder, Sphere
Simper SVF per-channel air absorption lowpass
RBJ biquad static boundary reflection shelf
SPSC lock-free background baker → audio thread handoff
Zero heap allocation on audio thread
Equal-power LFO panner with symmetry warp and level detection
